Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings;
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ryan D. Krohn, Esq., OF Glassberg, Pollak & Associates 291-8320 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party
Russell A. Robinson, Esq., 255-0462, for Defendant and Moving Party
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS MAGIC MOP, A PARTNERSHIP AKA GENERAL CLEANING SOLUTIONS, PEDRO NAVARRETE, and INGRID NAVARRETE'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted with leave to amend in good faith, or else, sanctions may be considered. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/REQ/jk) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

Ntc Of Mo For Order That The Genuineness Of Documents & Truth Of Facts Be Admitted & Compelling Responses To Interrogs & Production Of Documents & For Monetary Sanctions Including Attys' Fees
Off Calendar Apr-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Insurance Commissioner's motion to deem certain matters admitted is denied as responses have been served. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond in a timely fashion was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $540 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
